outputs.answer: Jharkhand Urja Sancharan Nigam Limited (JUSNL) is the State Transmission Utility responsible for power transmission in Jharkhand.

inputs.question: What employee expenses has JUSNL projected for FY 2025-26?

outputs.answer: JUSNL projected total employee expenses of Rs. 107.54 Crore for FY 2025-26, comprising Employee Expenses of Rs. 87.79 Crore and Terminal Benefits of Rs. 19.75 Crore.

inputs.question: What A&G expenses has JUSNL projected for FY 2025-26?

outputs.answer: JUSNL projected A&G expenses of Rs. 25.45 Crore for FY 2025-26, calculated by escalating FY 2024-25 A&G expenses by an inflation factor of 6.09%.
